economic_notes: Nation holds investments in 13 business entities accounted for by modified equity method including Mikisew Commercial Trust, hotel, mechanical services, industrial supply, powerline investment, sport fishing, and others. Agricultural Benefits Claim settled in 2018 for $135,972,938 creating Whachask Trust. Land claim settled in 1986 for $26,600,000 and 24,000 acres.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because Chief and Council instructed management to exclude condensed financial information of subsidiary business entities from Note 6 as required under modified equity method disclosures. 13 government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method; their condensed financial statements were withheld. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet includes remeasurement gains of $2,560,379 in addition to surplus of $202,598,030. Annual surplus includes $22,695,790 earnings from investments in Nation businesses. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $20,044,363 + FNDF $936,536 + Alberta $1,240,379 + CMHC $220,275 + ISETS $672,287 = $23,113,840. OSR = $39,847,235 - $23,113,840 = $16,733,395. Prior accumulated surplus is the surplus component only ($195,741,294) per Statement of Accumulated Surplus; total including remeasurement was $195,404,060.
